body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/receipt-file/download 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/receipt-file/download 
 ## 接口描述 
根据回单文件名称下载回单文件。
回单文件名称fileName对应回单文件查询接口返回值data中fileName值。
返回文件内容：ResponseEntity<byte[]>(data, headers, HttpStatus.OK)；data为文件字节数组，即byte[] bytes = response.body().bytes()就能拿到文件。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: GET  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fileName","required":true,"maxLength":"500","label":"%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"97845d94-fd50-4581-b4fd-a06052","desc":"%20%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%80%BCdata%E4%B8%ADfileName%E5%80%BC"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"code","exampleValue":"200","desc":"","label":"%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA","exampleValue":"%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求调用
```
{BaseUrl}/v1/receipt-file/download?fileName=97845d94-fd50-4581-b4fd-a06052
```
### 响应报文
```
{
    "code": 400,
    "message": "{\"returnCode\":\"XFFB000\",\"errorMsg\":\"未查询到相应的回单文件，请确认后重试\",\"body\":null}"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案|
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | 400 | 下载回单失败 |  |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/receipt-file/download

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/receipt-file/download

接口描述

根据回单文件名称下载回单文件。
回单文件名称fileName对应回单文件查询接口返回值data中fileName值。
返回文件内容：ResponseEntity<byte[]>(data, headers, HttpStatus.OK)；data为文件字节数组，即byte[] bytes = response.body().bytes()就能拿到文件。

调用方式

METHOD: GET

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[]}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fileName","required":true,"maxLength":"500","label":"%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"97845d94-fd50-4581-b4fd-a06052","desc":"%20%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%80%BCdata%E4%B8%ADfileName%E5%80%BC"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"code","exampleValue":"200","desc":"","label":"%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA","exampleValue":"%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求调用

{BaseUrl}/v1/receipt-file/download?fileName=97845d94-fd50-4581-b4fd-a06052

响应报文

{
    "code": 400,
    "message": "{\"returnCode\":\"XFFB000\",\"errorMsg\":\"未查询到相应的回单文件，请确认后重试\",\"body\":null}"
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息 解决方案
400 下载回单失败
